hero.title: NextStopRussia
hero.tagline: Your Gateway to Studying in Russia
hero.subtitle: Expert guidance for international students. Secure your admission in top Russian universities for MBBS, Engineering, Aviation, and Management programs.

about.bio: Dr. Jabroot Khatib is an MBBS graduate from one of Russia's top medical universities in Moscow. With over a decade of personal experience navigating the Russian education system as an international student, he founded NextStopRussia to simplify the admission journey for students worldwide. His deep understanding of Russian universities, visa requirements, and student life makes him the most trusted consultant for aspiring doctors, engineers, aviators, and business professionals.

contact.copyrightText: NextStopRussia | Founded by Dr. Jabroot Khatib. All rights reserved.
